# CookE - AI Cooking Companion

> CookE is an AI-powered cooking companion mobile app. Make a recipe from anything — upload a food photo, paste a TikTok or Instagram link, share a URL, or just describe what you want to eat. CookE generates a full structured recipe with ingredients, steps, and timing in seconds. Cook solo or together with a partner using color-coded steps.

## Features
- Make a Recipe from Anything: Upload a photo, paste a TikTok/Instagram/recipe URL, or describe a dish in text. CookE identifies the dish and generates a complete recipe.
- AI Recipe Generation: Not a recipe database. CookE generates recipes on demand using AI — every recipe includes ingredients with quantities, step-by-step instructions, prep time, and tips.
- Follow-Up Chat: Modify recipes mid-cooking. Swap ingredients, adjust spice level, scale servings, or handle dietary restrictions without starting over.
- Cook Together Mode: 2-cook mode assigns each step to Him (blue), Her (pink), or Together (purple). A "meanwhile" connector shows parallel steps so couples finish dinner faster.
- Step-by-Step Progress Tracking: Check off steps as you go with an ingredient checklist for shopping and prep.
- Import from TikTok, Instagram, and More: Paste a link from TikTok, Instagram Reels, food blogs, or upload photos of handwritten recipe cards.

## Free Tier (Monthly)
- 30 dish identifications from photos or text
- 30 AI recipe generations
- 40 follow-up chat messages
- No credit card required

## CookE Pro
- Unlimited identifications, recipes, and chat
- Priority support
- Annual plan saves 33% versus monthly

## Availability
- Android: Available on Google Play
- iOS: Coming soon

## About
CookE was built by Omri Ganor, a software engineer based in Israel, as a solo project to solve his own problem of always cooking the same few dishes.
